heroHeadline: Iran Deadline Extended to April 6 as Pakistan Confirms Indirect Talks; Senate Passes Partial DHS Bill
heroSubtitle: Trump grants third 10-day reprieve on Iran energy strikes; TSA agents receive back pay after weeks of missed checks; Trump signature to appear on US dollar bills; DOGE claims $215B saved at one-year mark, disputed by Cato and GAO
footerNote: Data sourced from White House, executive orders, court records, Reuters, AP, CBO, USTR, Pentagon, IEA. Economic data from BLS, BEA, Treasury, Goldman Sachs, Cato Institute.
